name: pid-context
description: Read P&ID drawing documents and expose industrial semantic context to Codex-compatible agents.

interface.shortDescription: Let agents inspect P&ID drawings as structured engineering context.
interface.longDescription: Reads .pid.json or SemanticIR drawing documents and provides equipment, flow, control-loop, and LLM context tools through MCP.
defaultPrompt: Find the equipment connected downstream of R-101.
Export a compact LLM context pack for this P&ID.
